chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1684of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 3. For orders on M.A 14789/16 04.11.2016. Mr. Imamuddin Otho, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel alongwith SIP Muhammad Bux Khoso and ASI Manzoor Hussain Solangi, P.S Kazi Ahmed. -.-.-. This petition is disposed of by the following order:- Today, learned State Counsel has filed parawise comments of police officials in which it has been categorically denied the any harassment was caused to the petitioner or the police officials have ever snatched Rs.55000/- from petitioner and it has been submitted that various FIRs are pending against one Sajjan, who is friend of petitioner. However, this has been controverted by petitioner’s counsel, who submits that continuous harassment has been caused to the petitioner. It would be just and proper to order that concerned SSP should hold an inquiry into this serious allegation against concerned police officials and submit a report to the Additional Registrar of this Court within three weeks from today. In the meantime, respondents are directed to conduct themselves in accordance with law. Copy of this order be provided to the learned State counsel for compliance. JUDGE Ali Haider
